{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232004501D224B4361EAD672E69A"}"},"total":1872},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529491455979864856","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追平了，世界观很宏大，很多一开始以为的错误，看到后面，对于零世界来说其实是正常的。能深刻的感觉到，生命的渺小，死亡的寻常，淡淡的绝望，很好看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753096635,"group_id":"7489684306369989694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阅读时长4455时+","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5W2XzGNz2meq96KhhZsyJA1NF159mMVLesc0nD+5MvR","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f4c13f73b8ca46a28b1bb19b1b05b771~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790726&x-signature=VY9v1JabpppL2Aw3M8UkqOGRV4s%3D","user_id":"4297307509500456","user_name":"江欲寒★"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4297307509500456","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1755586635,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7489684306369989694","book_info":{"abstract":"【领主】【求生】【末日】【诡异】【灾难】【建造流】【种田流】
这里是文明的坟墓，埋葬着无数世界的尸骸。
文明的死去如同星起星沉一样，只是自然。
在这个被绝境末日围绕的世界，想要活着却成为不可能的奢望。
饥饿、黑暗、混乱、怪物、诡异、古神、超凡，迷雾、神明，火种、深海、圣城、以及无尽的末日天灾。
陆悬河以及地球的万万人在无法预料的情况下，来到了这个世界。
深海呼唤着他的到来。
那么，在毁灭一切的末日风暴中央，深海领主，从一间小木屋开始。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c687701a8f363c78c499084ac4d72be9","author":"我有一片海","author_id":"","book_id":"7489684306369989694","book_name":"疯了吧！你管深海古神叫眷属？","book_short_name":"深海火种","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7489684399366095422","read_count":"83531","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1167834"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"541","tags":"游戏体育,末世,网游,求生,天灾,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3fe7d54afdde5af72e04fbcfe5aad9f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451490&x-signature=sjZtVFivnYuvNXjkCD0lnaaw2zY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"90235832461","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"266"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603232004501D224B4361EAD672E69A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":43,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36395,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":47613},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496156689585439513","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在所有的求生领主种田文里这本真的算耳目一新了，文笔人设剧情都不错，逻辑在线看到最新章个人感觉无毒点，文里更是罕见的男女角色都是正常人，没有所谓的对女性身体和美貌气质描写，以及没有出现只要是男主遇到的女性无论是什么样的身份和人设都离不开被男主下手的情节，也没有用一些所谓的荤段子来调节口味，大家都为了在这个诡异世界生存下来而努力着。作者大大把求生元素和诡异、深海（有点克苏鲁？）、领主、种田基建结合的很好，一口气看下来没有感觉到枯燥乏味，在求生的时候一点点展开背后诡异的世界原住民，唯一的缺点就是太短了[哭]，怎么就让我在刚出生没多久的时候看到了呢，希望大大后续稳定发挥，大大能不能多更点，很好看[求爆更]","text_exts":[{"e":186,"s":183,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774267490D672E69A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227496156689585439513%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227489684306369989694%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745339541,"group_id":"7489684306369989694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"什么时候番茄能出个拉黑帐号的功能，一些人真把这当自己家了🙄","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz+8YvGNmgp+WLvDjPFutIQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5ba04b81072249c4919bc690d673be7b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791865&x-signature=0pxBnm4T%2FY3IHw0ocXXgRVfqLCU%3D","user_id":"814108941234312","user_name":"一盆草。°"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"814108941234312","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":f
